zh.Stamford, Lincolnshire, England: 英國林可爾史爾斯坦福
zh.Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, England: 英國賀特福爾薩布利其沃斯
英國英格蘭林可爾史爾斯坦福
zh.lifeSummary: 當Edmund Browne於大約1494年出生在英國林可爾史爾斯坦福時，他的父親Christopher Browne I38歲，母親Agnes22歲。他和Joan Cecil至少有2個兒子。他去世於1566年1月25日在英國賀特福爾薩布利其沃斯享年73歲。

zh-hans.Stamford, Lincolnshire, England: 英国林可爾史爾斯坦福
zh-hans.Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, England: 英国賀特福爾薩布利其沃斯
英国英格兰林可爾史爾斯坦福
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Edmund Browne于大约1494年出生在英国林可爾史爾斯坦福时，他的父亲Christopher Browne I38岁，母亲Agnes22岁。他和Joan Cecil至少有2个儿子。他去世于1566年1月25日在英国賀特福爾薩布利其沃斯享年73岁。

nameMeanings.name: Browne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably also an Americanized form (translation into English) of German   Braune   or   Braun  .
Irish: phonetic Anglicization of Mac an Bhreitheamhnaigh; see Breheny .

variants.name: Brown
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: generally a nickname referring to the color of the hair or complexion, Middle English br(o)un, from Old English brūn or Old French brun. This word is occasionally found in Old French, Middle English and Old Norse as a personal name or byname (Middle English personal name Brun, Broun, ancient Germanic Bruno, Old English Brūn, or possibly Old Norse Brúnn or Brúni). Brun- was also an ancient Germanic name-forming element. Some instances of Old English Brūn as a personal name may therefore be short forms of compound names such as Brūngar, Brūnwine, etc. As a Scottish and Irish name, it sometimes represents a translation of Gaelic Donn (see below). Brown (including in the senses below) is the fourth most frequent surname in the US. It is also very common among African Americans and Native Americans (see also 5 below).
Irish and Scottish: adopted for Ó Duinn (see Dunn ) or for any of the many Irish and Scottish Gaelic names containing the element donn ‘brown-haired’ (also meaning ‘chieftain’), for example Donahue .
Irish: phonetic Anglicization of Mac an Bhreitheamhnaigh; see Breheny .

nameMeanings.name: Edmund
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + mund ‘protector’. It was borne by several early royal and saintly figures, including a 9th-century king of East Anglia killed by invading Danes, allegedly for his adherence to Christianity. In the 16th and 17th centuries, there was a good deal of interchange between Edmund and Edward.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Edmund Browne was born about 1494, in Stamford, Lincolnshire, England, his father, Christopher Browne I, was 38 and his mother, Agnes, was 22. He had at least 2 sons with Joan Cecil. He died on 25 January 1566, in Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, England, at the age of 73.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edmund Browne est né environ 1494, à Stamford, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Christopher Browne I, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Agnes, avait 22 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils avec Joan Cecil. Il est décédé le 25 janvier 1566, à Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 73 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Edmund Browne um 1494 in Stamford, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Christopher Browne I 38 und seine Mutter Agnes 22. Er hatte mit Joan Cecil mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb am 25. Januar 1566 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Edmund Browne è nato il circa 1494 nel Stamford, Lincolnshire, England, il suo padre, Christopher Browne I, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Agnes, aveva 22 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli con Joan Cecil. Morì il 25 gennaio 1566, nel Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, England, all'età di 73 anni.

ja.Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, England: イギリスハートフォードシュアイアサウブリジェウオルス
イギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスタムフォード
ja.lifeSummary: Edmund Browneが約1494年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスタムフォードで生まれた時，父Christopher Browne Iは38歳，母Agnesは22歳であった。彼はJoan Cecilとの間に少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。彼は1566年1月25日にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアサウブリジェウオルスで73歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Edmund Browne(이)가 대략 1494년 영국 링코실르 스타퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Christopher Browne I(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes(은)는 22세였다. 그는 Joan Cecil(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1566년 1월 25일 영국 허트퍼드실르 사w브리지워스에서 73세의 나이로 사망했다.

Stamford, Lindon, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Edmund Browne nasceu aproximadamente 1494, em Stamford, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Christopher Browne I, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Agnes, tinha 22 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos com Joan Cecil. Ele faleceu em 25 de janeiro de 1566, em Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, com 73 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edmund Browne родился около 1494 г. в местности стамфорд, линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Christopher Browne I было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes, 22. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына от Joan Cecil. Он умер 25 января 1566 г. в местности савбриджюорт, хиртфордшир, Англия в возрасте 73 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Edmund Browne nació aproximadamente 1494, en Stamford, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Christopher Browne I, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Agnes, tenía 22 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos con Joan Cecil. Murió el 25 de enero de 1566, en Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 73 años.
